title: PageRank with PySpark
description: PageRank implemented in PySpark â€” iteratively computes node importance scores across a web graph using a configurable damping factor (beta=0.8) over 40 iterations. Uses groupByKey and reduceByKey with lambda expressions to distribute link contributions and accumulate rank values across partitions.
shortDescription: Iterative PageRank over a web graph using PySpark groupByKey and reduceByKey.
